channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Gujarat Board Announces HSC Class 12 Results for Science and General Streams Today
item.description: The Gujarat Secondary and Higher Secondary Education Board (GSEB) is all set to declare the HSC or Class 12 results for both Science and General streams on May 4, 2026, at 10 am. Students who appeared...

item.title: Tanzanian banks report rising profits despite high lending costs and fees
item.description: Tanzania's commercial banks posted strong profits in the first quarter of 2026, with total net earnings of Sh658.2 billion, up 10.12 percent from the previous quarter. The main driver was interest inc...

item.title: Two-bedroom Rose Bay apartment sells for $1.3 million despite limited amenities
item.description: A 90-square-metre, two-bedroom apartment at 4/1A Caledonian Road, Rose Bay, NSW, recently sold at auction for $1.3 million. Despite lacking a dedicated parking space and natural light, the property at...

item.title: CRDB Insurance reports strong growth with Sh4.4 billion profit and proposes Sh1.5 billion dividend
item.description: The board of CRDB Insurance Company has proposed a dividend payout of Sh1.5 billion, which is Sh439 per share, for the financial year ending December 31, 2025. This proposal will need approval from th...

item.title: West Bengal Assembly Elections 2026: Mamata Banerjee Leading in Bhabanipur Amidst Close Contest in Nandigram
item.description: In the 2026 West Bengal Assembly elections, the counting of votes saw Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee leading against Bharatiya Janata Party’s Suvendu Adhikari in the Bhabanipur constituency. By 1.10 p...

item.title: Vote Counting Underway for Umreth Assembly Bypoll in Gujarat
item.description: The vote counting for the Umreth Assembly by-election in Gujarat commenced on Monday, May 4, 2026, under strict security arrangements. The bypoll was conducted on April 23 following the unfortunate de...

item.title: Capital1's Gaston and Doromal to Compete Again in BVR Sipalay Open
item.description: The BVR Sipalay Open is set to welcome back notable beach volleyball players Pauline Gaston and Roma Doromal from Capital1, marking their return to the Beach Volleyball Republic (BVR) tournament scene...

item.title: Sule Lamido Calls For Unity Within PDP and Invites Former Leaders Back
item.description: Former Jigawa State Governor, Sule Lamido, don talk say members of the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) suppose put aside their wahala and focus on unity. According to am, if dem no reconcile, e fit dam...

item.title: Economic and Investment Outlook: Q1 2026 Impact of Geopolitical Tensions and Energy Shocks
item.description: The first quarter of 2026 began on a positive note for both the global and South African economies, but optimism was quickly shaken by geopolitical events. In late February, US and Israeli strikes on ...

item.title: Kenwyn Islamic Society Calls for Resignation of Mosque Trustees Following Controversy
item.description: The Kenwyn community in Cape Town is expressing widespread concern after a week of controversy surrounding the Waterloo Road Mosque. The Kenwyn Islamic Society (KIS) has formally requested the resigna...

item.title: APC Aspirants Rush to Collect Forms as Sale Ends Today
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) has seen a surge of aspirants heading to the Abuja Continental Hotel in the final days of form sales for the 2027 general elections. Hundreds of aspirants, accompan...

item.title: Jonathan Greenberger Assumes Role as POLITICO Global Editor-in-Chief
item.description: Effective May 1, 2026, Jonathan Greenberger has officially assumed the position of Global Editor-in-Chief at POLITICO. Greenberger, who joined the organization in 2024 as an Executive Vice President, ...

item.title: King Charles and Queen Camilla conclude US state visit with ceremonial and community engagements
item.description: King Charles III and Queen Camilla concluded their four-day state visit to the United States with a series of symbolic and community-focused engagements. Their final day began at the White House, wher...

item.title: Trump announces plan to reopen Strait of Hormuz amid ongoing tensions with Iran
item.description: US President Donald Trump has announced that the United States will take action to reopen the Strait of Hormuz as early as Monday morning, describing it as a humanitarian gesture aimed at assisting ne...

item.title: Coinage Fund Management Secures SEC Licence to Operate in Nigeria
item.description: Coinage Fund Management Ltd, wey be Africa-focused investment company, don receive approval from Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) Nigeria to operate as Fund and Portfolio Manager. According to...

item.title: Strong 6.1-Magnitude Earthquake Hits Eastern Samar
item.description: A magnitude 6.1 earthquake struck Eastern Samar on May 4, 2026, causing concern among residents in the affected areas. According to initial reports, the tremor was felt across several towns and cities...

item.title: Two Kano Federal Lawmakers Resign from ADC Over Party Changes
item.description: Two members of the House of Representatives from Kano State don exit the African Democratic Congress (ADC) recently. Sani Adamu Wakili, wey dey represent Minjibir/Ungogo Federal Constituency, send let...

item.title: Larvotto Reports Strong High-Grade Gold, Antimony and Tungsten Intercepts at Hillgrove, NSW
item.description: Larvotto Resources has reported further encouraging diamond drilling results from its Midas Gully system at the Metz Mining Centre, part of the Hillgrove gold-antimony project in New South Wales. Key ...

item.title: Preparing Canadian Schools for Responsible AI Integration in Education
item.description: As artificial intelligence (AI) continues to advance at a rapid pace, Canadian education leaders face the challenge of integrating it responsibly and effectively. AI is no longer a futuristic tool—it ...

item.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2 achieves record-breaking box office success internationally
item.description: The Devil Wears Prada 2 has opened to spectacular success worldwide, earning US$234 million in its debut weekend. In Australia alone, it achieved the highest opening of the year, raking in AU$11.03 mi...
